name.description: The skill to update. Use the workbench_skills tool to list valid skill names.

previous.description: The exact text block in the skill contents you want to replace. This must include and preserve all whitespace and newline characters exactly as they appear in the skill.

replacement.description: The new text block that replaces `previous`. Preserve all intended whitespace and newline characters exactly in this replacement text.

branch_name.description: A concise, valid git branch name for the pull request that will carry this skill update.

pr_title.description: The pull request title for this skill change.

pr_description.description: The pull request body. Should give reviewers enough context: Summary, what changed in the skill, and rationale. Use markdown as appropriate.

commit_message.description: The commit message for this skill change.
